flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Middlesex College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Middlesex College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Middlesex College rose 55% between 2006 and 2009 (9.8% → 15.2%).
